scripts.build: node scripts/build-app.mjs && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.cjs -i styles/tailwind.input.css -o tailwind.css --minify
scripts.check: node scripts/build-app.mjs && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.cjs -i styles/tailwind.input.css -o tailwind.css --minify && node scripts/validate-content.mjs && node scripts/validate-production.mjs && node --check app.js && node --check psalmBriefs.js && node --check mbe-unified.js
